info.name: School App API
info.description: Importable Postman collection generated from the APIs currently used in this project.

request.description: Student login/authentication.
Staff login/authentication.
Fetch student dashboard/home summary data.
Fetch device-login history/details for a student account.
Fetch student profile/details.
Update student profile information.
Update parent profile information.
Update guardian profile information.
Submit a Contact Us / help request.
Fetch sibling/student-linked accounts data.
Fetch holiday list/data.
Fetch school news list/data.
Fetch school event list/data.
Fetch student notifications.
Fetch student attendance summary/calendar data.
Fetch student transport/route data.
Fetch student timetable data.
Fetch student achievements data.
Fetch library catalog data for students.
Fetch books issued to a student.
Fetch fee summary and related receipt/payment summary data.
Fetch fee due details and payment-plan information for a student.
Generate the encrypted payment payload used before fee payment.
Fetch syllabus data/documents.
Fetch exam schedule/exam document data.
Fetch student notes data.
Fetch student assignment/homework data.
Fetch student fortnightly planner data.
Mark student content items such as assignments, notes, or planners as read/viewed.
Fetch student multimedia/video content.
Fetch student grade/marks data for the selected term and exam type.
Fetch available exam types for a class and term.
Fetch student performance report list/data.
Download a student performance report PDF.
Fetch support ticket category/type options.
Submit a student support/help ticket.
Fetch student support tickets grouped by status.
Fetch response history/details for a student support ticket.
Fetch available class options for attendance screens.
Fetch available section options for attendance screens.
Fetch student list and attendance state for a class/section/date.
Submit student attendance for a class, section, and date.
Fetch staff leave request list/history.
Fetch staff leave-balance/leave-allocation details.
Fetch the details of a specific leave request.
Create or submit a staff leave request without file.
Create or submit a staff leave request with file.
Fetch issue type options for staff issue submission.
Fetch student profile/details by admission number.
Submit an issue/request in the staff issue-submission flow.
Fetch issues/requests raised by the current user.
Fetch staff support tickets grouped by assigned/unsolved/solved states.
Fetch response/details for a staff support ticket.
Set or update the deadline for an assigned support ticket.
Submit feedback/status updates for a support ticket.
Fetch department list for staff item requests.
Fetch stock/item master data for staff item requests.
Fetch submitted staff item requests.
Submit a staff item purchase/request entry.
Fetch staff profile data and teaching assignments.
Fetch teacher homework/assignment list.
Create or update teacher homework/assignment entries with optional file upload.
Fetch teacher notes list.
Create or update teacher notes with optional file upload.
Fetch teacher fortnightly planner list.
Create or update a teacher fortnightly planner entry with optional file upload.
Update publish/delete status for teacher content such as homework, notes, and planners.
Fetch multimedia records for a teacher by class and subject.
Fetch the library catalog for staff library screens.
Fetch books currently issued to a teacher.
Upload an item-purpose image in the staff item-request flow.
